<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
	<head>
	<meta charset="UTF-8">
		<style>
			.svg-container{
				width:100%;
				max-width:100%;
				display:none;
			}

			.svg-container svg{
				width:100%;
				height:auto;
				display:block;
			}
		</style>
	</head>
<html>
	<body>
		<div class="card">
		<select id="dropdown" onchange="switchCountry()">
			%OPTIONS%
		</select>
		<br/>
			%SVG%
		</div>

		<script>
			function switchCountry() {
				// Get selected value and create a clean html id without spaces or umlauts
				var selected_element = document.getElementById('dropdown').value;
				var clean_id = selected_element.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9]/g, '');

				// Find all svg containers
				var all_elements = document.getElementsByClassName('svg-container');

				// Hide all containers
				for (var i = 0; i < all_elements.length; i++) {
				  all_elements[i].style.display = 'none';
				}

				// Show current target container
				var target_id = 'container_' + clean_id;
				document.getElementById(target_id).style.display = 'block';
			}
		</script>

	</body>
</html>
</html>
